titleStmt.title: SII 9.297: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 297. (A.R. No. 56 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP TO THE SOUTH OF THE BASAVESVARA TEMPLE AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

summary.p: The inscription is dated Śaka 1099, Hēmaḷambi, Āshāḍha, ba. Kṛishṇāṅgārakachaturdaśī corresponding to A.D. 1177 June 26, Sunday. It belongs to the reign of the Kalachurya king Śaṅkhavarmadēva ruling from Kalyāṇapura. With the consent of the Sinda chief Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara Rāchamalla, who was a feudatory of the king, the Mummuridaṇḍas of Kuṟugōḍu constructed a trikūṭa temple and having set up in it the image of Gavaṟēśvara made a grant of land, a voluntary contribution of cesses levied on every article sold or purchased in the city and of tolls, specially levied for this purpose, on every imported article. It states that Malliseṭṭi, whose genealogy is given, set up the image of Mallikārjunadēva and made a grant for the service of the god. It further states that Muddarasa set up the image of Muddēśvara and made a grant of land for the service of the god. Muddarāja's genealogy is given as follows: Mārtaṇḍadēva of Kawṇḍinya-gōtra, his sons Sōyidēva, Rēchadēva, Kāḷidāsa and Muddarāja. The Mummuridaṇḍas are said to have been Baṇañjigas, “the brave of the brave, protectors of the submissive, cruel to the wicked, good to the good and conquerors of powerful enemies”.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ namaśśivāya . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
jayati bhuvanakarttā durdharāghaughaharttā sakalasuravariṣṭhaḥ sastataudāryyaniṣṭhaḥ . paramasukhasumūrttirddēva
tācakravarttiḥ . Iti suravarabriṁdastōtrapātraṁ namāmi . śrīmadamarēndrayakṣastōmārccitacaraṇanavanivanavahnima
rudvyōmātmēṁdvinatanuvīgī muṁmuridaṇḍadiṣṭimaṁ gavaṟēśaṁ . svasti sumastabhuva nāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja
kaḷacuryyakuḻakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ śrīmatśaṁkhavarmmadēvacakravartti vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddha mānamācandrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiralittalu . śrījaṁ
būdvīpalakṣmīvadanatiḷakamirppaṁte celvāgi lakṣmībhājaṁ śrītuṁgabhadrāhvayasuranadiyintenkkalopputtamirkkuṁ rā
jīvōtkīrṇnaṣaṁḍapratatigaḷinaśōkāmrapunnāgatāḷōrvvijānīkaṁgaḷiṁ kikkiṟigiṟidu jagatsēvyamatyantabhabyatiḷigoḷadiṁ maḍaltu ta
ḷitārameyiṁ neṟe pūtu kāytu paṇteḷege viḷāsamappa vanadiṁ pathikargge tṛṣāśramakṣudhāvaḷiyanaṁdāgalīyavanāvārggavenalkaḍuraṁ
yyamāgi kaṇgoḷisuva ballakuṁdevesarindesevā viṣayāntarāḷadoḷu . baḷedu maḍalta śāḷivanadiṁ beḷadāgasamantuḍuṁkutuṁ
giḷigaḷa piṇḍinindeseva keyvoladiṁ mugiluddavāgi mūvaḷisida kōṭeyiṁ dhanada dhānyada sommina sokkinindamārgaḷadomma nammo
ḷeṁba kuḍiyokkala makkaḷinūrggaḷoppugu . Ā nāḷge rājadhāni dharānārīhāraluḷitanāyakamaṇivōlnānāratnākīrṇna
nagānīkada baḷasiniṁda kurugōḍesagu . mattamentirddudeṁdeḍe . kulagirigaḷge mērugiriyirppavolirddudu tāṁ nadīnadāvaḷige
payaḥpayōdhi negaḷdirppavolirddudu tārakāsamākuḷake himāmśubiṁbamesadirppavolirddudā vasuṁdharālalanege vaktrapaṁkaruha
mirppavolirdudu nōrppaḍā pura . Ā purade . naḷanaḷisuttamirppa lateyiṁ paripakvaphaḷapracāradiṁ baḷabaḷa baḷkuvāṁbravanadindatinirmma
ḷapadmaṣaṁḍadiṁ tiḷakatamāḷatāḷavakuḷadṛmalōdhralavaṁgabhūruhāvaḷigaḷinīkṣiparggatimanōharavalte bahiḥpuraṁ karaṁ . Allallige tiḷigoḷa
nuṁ malligeyuṁ mādhavīlatāmaṇḍapamuṁ pallavitacūtavanamuṁ sallalitaṁ nōḍalettaluṁ poṟavoḷaloḷ . Aṁcegaḷiṁcaramuṁ suttu celveni
sirda gaṁdhaśāligaḷēṁ mattaṁ cakravākahaṁsīsaṁcaradiṁdeseva bahutaṭākadineseguṁ . Uravaṇiyiṁde baṁda magadhāṁdhrakaḷiṁgacaḷukyapāṇḍyagūrjjara
renipaggadaṇnalegaḷennoḷe bhaṁgamanāṁtu pōdarārdoreyenageṁbahaṁkṛtiyinunnativettudenalke percciyaṁbaramanadādagaḷḷiṟigumēvo
gaḷveṁ kuṟugōḍa kōṭeyaṁ . dhanadiṁ dhanadaninaggaḷamenisuva paradarinamūlyaratnaṁgaḷinatyanupamavicitravastrādyanēkadiṁdoppugu vaṇigvāṭaṁgaḷ vividhō
ttuṁgalasatsudhādhavaḷasaṁkāśācchyasucchāyeyiṁ bhuvanāḷaṁkṛtamappa dēvabhavanānīkaṁgaḷiṁ tarkkaśāstravivādaṁgaḷinudghavēdaravadiṁdaṁ hōmadhūmaṁgaḷiṁ
davanīśōbhitamāgi kaṇgoḷisuguṁ viprēṁdravāṭaṁgaḷu . smararājadhāniyo suravanitājanmabhūmiyō cilviṁgāgaramō pēḷeṁbinegaṁ karame
seguṁ sūḷegērigaḷu tatpuradoḷ . Ā puramanāḷvanakhiḷakaḷāparipūrṇnaṁ phaṇīṁdrakulasaṁbhavanājñāparanudghasucāritrōpamitaṁ viśada
kīrttivijayavinōdaṁ . svasti śrīsiṁdavaṁśapraṇutakamaḷamārttaṁḍanugrārimastanyastāṁghridvaṁdvanārādhitanutakalidēvāṁghṛpadmaṁ dharitrīprastu
ttyaṁ śatrubhūbhrijjayapaṭupaṭahāghōṣaṇabyāghracihnaṁ vistīrṇnōrvvītaḷēśaṁ nṛpakuḷatiḻakaṁ rācamallakṣitīśaṁ . sitagaragaṁḍa
nutsavakaraṁḍanavaṁ kadanapracaṁḍanāśritasurabhūjanujvaḷitatējananūnasukhaikabhājanarccitaśivapādanāhavavinōdanaśēṣajanapravōdanānata
ripumaṁḍaḷēśvaraniḷēśvara bhōgavatīpurēśvara . Udvṛttamaṁḍalikatārakaṣaḍānanaṁ vidviḍbaḻadhvaṁsasabaḷapaṁcānanaṁ Asadaḷaṁkārā(ṁ)nyanārīvidūraṁ A
sadṛśamahāghōrasaṁgrāmadhīraṁ vipulavidvadvinutasāhasōttuṁgaṁ . nṛpatiḷaka sāyidēvana vīrasiṁgaṁ kalidēvadibyapadapaṁkajārādhakaṁ . bala
vadaribhūpāḷakuḷasainyasādhakaṁ . Iṁtenisi negaḷdadhātrīkāṁtōttama rācamallanṛpananumatadiṁda tatpuramūlastaṁbhaṁ tāmenisirddara
lte mu(ṁ)muridaṁḍaṁ . Avara pratāpameṁteṁdaḍe . kaḍumuḷisinde baydaḍe diṭaṁ biḍi tāne kanaldubaydu nāḻduḍidaḍe vōleyaṁ
javanumātana bāḷkeya lekkadōleyaṁ toḍadu bisuṭṭaneṁdaṟivudendaḍavēṁ pogaḻdappanēṁ baṇni didapanēnanā purada vīrabaṇiṁjigarugratējamaṁ nēridaralladu
ddhataranīgaḷe sikṣipemeṁdu niṁdārabhaseprabhāvamanadevesagoṁḍapeyaṇna lōkasaṁhārakamūrtti rudraniṭiḷākṣigamāpralayōgravahnigaṁ māriya
rigaṁ javanaṁ bārigamaggaḷamāgi tōṟuguṁ . ragaḷe . śrīmadāryyānāmapuramukhyabhūtarenipaynūrvvariṁdodavidanvayāyā
taruṁ . bhagavatīlabdhavaradānaprasādaruṁ . Agaṇitamahatsaukhyasaṁpatpramōdaruṁ . cakradharadattacakradhvajavirājaruṁ . prārtthitārtthiprakara
surarājabhūjaruṁ . sāhasōttuṁgaruṁ . harapādabhṛṁgaruṁ . caladaṅkarāmaruṁ balagarvvabhīmaruṁ . Asahāyasauryyaruṁ mērugiridhairyyaruṁ . Ēkai
kavīraruṁ . lōkaykasūraruṁ paravadhūdūraruṁ bhuvananistāraruṁ . caladartthigaṇḍaruṁ saṁgrāmaśauṇḍaruṁ . Adhikapracaṇḍaruṁ nuḍidantegaṇḍaruṁ .

śaraṇāgatarakṣakardduṣṭajanaśikṣakaru(ṁ) siḍila naḍigisuvarttoḍardaraṁ kolisuvar . kīrttinārāyaṇaru . Udyamaparāyaṇardduṣṭargge duṣṭar . si
ṣṭargge siṣṭaruṁ gavaṟēśadibyacaraṇāṁbujārādhakarbhbhuvanadoḷu duṣṭaripukuḷasainyasādhakar Abhinavadvārāvatīpuramidenisirdda . kuṟugōḍa
paṭṭaṇasvāmigaḷkūḍiḻdu . ka . Antosedirddu māḍi gavaṟēśvaradēvara supratiṣṭheyaṁ saṁtōsadiṁ tadīśvarane tāranagēṁdramanartthiyinde mūṟuṁ teṟanāgi ni
rmmisidano mudadiṁ nelasiḻdanakkumeṁbanteseyalu trikūṭamane māḍisidarpparamānurāgadiṁ . va . Antā trikūṭada prathamasthaḷada śrīmadgavaṟēśvaradēvargge
nityanaivēdyakkuṁ naṁdādīvigeguṁ jīrṇnōddhārakuṁ śrīmadgavaṟegaḷella kūḍiḻdu śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ rācamalladēvapramukhavāgi sakavarṣa 1099 neya
hēmaḷaṁbisaṁvatsaradāṣāḍha bahuḷa kṛṣṇāṁgāracatuḻdaśi mahātithiyaṁdu śrīmahādēvara sannidhānadalu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa keyi kuṟu
gōḍa holadalu maṁcimarasane dēvara keyyiṁ mūḍalu haṭṭaṇada dāriyiṁ teṁkalu takkilu Oḍḍihaṭṭiya gaḍiṁbada ghaḷeyalu mattaru . mattaṁ muddēśvaradēvara tōṭa
diṁ teṁkalu bhōgēśvarada tōṁṭadiṁ baḍagalu koṭṭa hūdōṁṭa 1 Alliṁ teṁkaṇa mūḍaṇa deseya hūdōṁṭa 1 paradēśigaḷu Aḷava tūguvaysaṁbaraṁgaḷaluṁ Eṇisuva dava
saṁ māṟidalli koṭṭa hoṁge hāga 1 mummaridaṁḍaṁgaḷu bhaṇḍavaṁ tūgisi koṁḍalli koṭṭa beḷe hoṁge hāga 1 nānādēśigaḷu samastadavasavaṁ māṟidalli hoṁge koṭṭakāṇi 2 mataṁ
māṟeda davasadalu koṭṭalli hoṁge māna 1 paṭṭaṇada nakharugaḷu koṁḍalli va 21 Aṁgaḍiyalu hāneyaluṁ saṭṭuga bhatta . sāsirvvaru hēṟiṁgele 100 hoṟige 50 koṭṭaru
mattaṁ lāḍacōḷamalayāḷateluṁgaka(ṁ)nnaḍasamastanānādēśigaḷu pēḷāvigaseṭṭiyaddēvargge koṭṭāya kudurege hāga 1 dēvara puradoḷage nandādīvigege nāḍugaḷkoṭṭa
gāṇa 2 bhairavadēvara dīvigege gāṇa 1 kammaṭadali hōva hoṁge daḷakepe 2 kā mattaṁ meṇasaḷadalli hoṁge māna 1 daḷake 4 koṁbu bellake nūṟu koṁḍu
mattamā trikūṭadoḷu śrīmanmallikārjjunadēvara supratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍida śrīmanmahāvaḍḍabyavahāri malliseṭṭiyanvayameṁtendeḍe .
vritta . saradhigabhīranūrjjitavibhotikulajātanudāranappa bhāsuramaṇi bāgiseṭṭiya sutaṁ sujanāgraṇi sūriseṭṭi sauṁdaratanu
rēcisiṭṭiyenisirddavaragrajanudchasadguṇākaranene malliseṭṭi nijavaṁśasudhārṇnavapūrṇnacaṁdramaṁ . bhūvinuta mallikārjjunadēvara samyakpratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi
si sadbhāvadinettisi vinutaśivāvasathamanuttarābhimukhadindeseyal . Ā Uttarābhimukhada mallikārjjunadēvargge nityanaivēdyakkaṁ nandādīvigegaṁ jīrṇnōddhārakkam śrimanmahā
maṁḍalēśvaraṁ rācamallapramukhavāgi malliseṭṭiyā tithiyalu dēvargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa keyi kuṟugōḍa holadalu maṁcimarasana keṟeya hinde sirigeṟeya dāriyiṁ
mūḍalu muddēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ teṁkalu maṁjēśvarada keyyiṁdaṁ haṭṭaṇada dāriyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu Aṁḍageṟeya dāriyinteṁkalu kisukāḍu mattaru 2 takkilu mattar 2 paraṁjyōtidēvara
tōṁṭadiṁ benakana tōṁṭadiṁ paḍuvalu haḷḷadiṁ baḍagalu koṭṭa hūdōṭa 1 dēvara puradoḷage naṁdādīvigege gāṇa 1 samastanānādēśi pēḷāvigaseṭṭiyarddēvargge koṭṭā
ya kudurege vīsa 2 kāṇi 2 mattaṁ samastadavasadaluṁ koṭṭalli hoṁgesoḷasa 2 koṁḍalli soḷasa 2
mattamā trikūṭadoḷ . v® . śrīmatkauṁḍilyagōtrōdbhavanenisida mārttaṇḍadēvaṁge lakṣmīprēmāḷaṁkāre cākāṁbikegudiyisidagrātmajaṁ sāyidēvaṁ
śrīmantaṁ rēcadēvaṁ sakaḷaguṇayutaṁ kāḷidāsaṁ pramukhyaṁ śrīmanmuddēśvarāṁghridvayanutasumanōraṁjitaṁ muddarājaṁ . svāmivesaresava vaṇija
svāmigaḷaynūrvvarosedu koṭṭaṇnage prāmāṇyamāge gauḍasvāmivesarvvaḍeda muddarājane dhanyaṁ . vaḍḍācārava nuḍidaṁdeḍḍave pogaḷvaṁge guḍḍa śāstrānvitasaṁvaḍḍiya ne
ndu pogaḷvudu vaḍḍabyavahāri muddanaṁ dhare satataṁ . baladēva ninna karuṇada balavuṁṭenageṁdu sāyidēvannaṁ balu sale tottu goṇḍadayakēṁ salevuṁṭe mudduliṁga sirigaḷagēśā .
hara śaraṇeṁbaṁ bhaktara karuṇave śaraṇeṁba śivanaḍiṁgaraneṁbaṁ hiriyaṇna sāvidēvana paramānujñeyane tāḷdidaṁ muddarasaṁ . karamartthiyinde muddēśvaradēvara supratiṣṭeyaṁ mā
ḍi manōharamappa śivālayamaṁ racisidaṁ dakṣiṇābhimukhadindeseyalu . Ā muddēśvaradēvargge nityanaivēdyakkaṁ nandādīvigegaṁ jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ rācama
lladēvapramukhavāgi muddarasanā tithiyalu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭa keyi kuṟuṁgōḍa holadalu sirigeṟeya dāriyiṁ mūḍalu mallikārjjunadēvara keyyiṁ baḍagalu paraṁ
jyōtidēvara keyyiṁ teṁkalu Abhinavasiddhanāthadēvara keyyiṁ paḍuvalu kaṭikūradāriyali kisukāḍu mattar 2 takkilu mattar 2 gavaṟēśvarada tōṇṭadim baḍagalu hūdōṁṭa 1 dēva
rapuradoḷage nandādīvigege gāṇa 2 samastanānādēśi pēḷāvigaseṭṭiyarddēvargge koṭṭāya kudurege vīsa 2 kāṇi 2 samastadavasagaḷaluṁ koṭṭalli hon
ge soḷasa 2 koṁḍalli soḷasa 2
mattamantellaruṁ kūḍirddā mūṟuṁ sthānada pātrapāvuḷakke śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ rācamalladēvapramukhavāgi gavaṟīśvaradēvara mallikārjunadēvara muddēśvaradēvara
sannidhānadalā tithiyoḷu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa keyi kuṟuṁgōḍa holadalu koṁcageṟeya dāriyiṁ mūḍalu kalidēvara keyyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu kōṇeya siddhanā
thadēvara keyyiṁ teṁkalu naḍuve karivūra dāriyāgalu hiriya kōla gaḍiṁbadalu kisukāḍu mattar 9 takkilu mattaru 10
Iṁtī trikūṭada dēvasthānada dharmmakāryyavaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ rācamalladēvarasanuṁ paṭṭaṇada samastamummuridaṇḍaṁgaḷu Ubhayanānādēśigaḷuṁ pra
mukhadēvaputrakarāgirddu dēvakāryyaṁ pūjepunaskāravaṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga nityanaimi ttikaṁgaḷaṁ bhaktipūrvvakaṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisi naḍasuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.297 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
